name: Naked and Famous

spec.method_detail: Shake with ice. Double strain into chilled coupe.

history: Joaquín Simó created the Naked and Famous at Death & Co in New York in 2011. Another equal-parts descendant of the Last Word, this one replacing gin with mezcal and Chartreuse green with Chartreuse yellow (milder). The smoke of mezcal against Aperol's bitterness and Chartreuse's herbality — it works immediately. A benchmark of the modern craft cocktail canon.
